Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Its Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: GREG CALL, ESQ., 415.599.0215, FOR PLAINTIFF BRANDGENUITY LLC.
WILLIAM KEANE, ESQ., 415.954.4400, FOR DEFENDANT ZUNGA INC.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ZYNGA, INC.'s Motion To Seal Portions Of Its Motion To Compel IS Off calendar per moving party. JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES WATSON, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And To Compel Compliance
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: GREG CALL, ESQ., 415.599.0215, FOR PLAINTIFF BRANDGENUITY LLC.
WILLIAM KEANE, ESQ., 415.954.4400, FOR DEFENDANT ZYNGA INC.

RULING: THE COURT HEARS ARGUMENT ON DEFENDANT ZYNGA, INC.'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And To Compel Compliance. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ORDERS COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER TO REACH AGREEMENT ON CERTAIN DOCUMENTS AND, AFTER CONFERRING, TO SUBMIT TO THE COURT A JOINT/SEPARATE PROPOSED ORDER RE: DEFENDANT ZYNGA, INC.'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And To Compel Compliance. JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES WATSON, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Set For Trial On Nov-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: philip leider, esq., braun hagey & borden, 415.599.0217, for plaintiff brandgenuity llc.
nell clement, esq. and william keane, esq., garella braun & martel, 415.954.4400, for defendand zynga inc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ZYNGA, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff has properly pled a claim for goods and services rendered. Defendant's request for judicial notice is denied. The terms of a contract are not a proper subject for judicial notice. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
